title: PHP Merhaba Dunya
subtitle: Basit PHP konsol programi ornegi.
code:
<?php

echo "Merhaba, Playground!\n";

$name = "Dunya";
echo "Merhaba, " . $name . "!\n";

$numbers = [5, 12, 8, 1, 9, 3];

$max = $numbers[0];
$sum = 0;

foreach ($numbers as $n) {
    if ($n > $max) {
        $max = $n;
    }
    $sum += $n;
}

echo "En buyuk sayi: " . $max . "\n";
echo "Toplam: " . $sum . "\n";

?>
